entities.name: COMPARATIVE MAP AND TRAIT VIEWER (CMTV)
entities.description: An integrated bioinformatic tool to construct consensus maps and compare QTL and functional genomics data across genomes and experiments

entities.name: GENOMIC DATA
entities.description: Information produced using functional and molecular marker approaches

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL AND MOLECULAR MARKER APPROACHES
entities.description: Diverse array of approaches used to produce genomic data

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Common areas of the genome involved in the expression of target phenotypic traits

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Sequences involved in the expression of target phenotypic traits

entities.name: SYNTENIC REGIONS
entities.description: Regions of genomic maps that show conserved gene order across taxa

entities.name: CONSENSUS MAP
entities.description: A map created by combining maps from separate experiments

entities.name: CIMMYT
entities.description: International Maize and Wheat Improvement Center

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop used in the case study for drought tolerance research

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The specific phenotypic trait studied in maize

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCUS (QTL)
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular phenotypic trait

entities.name: LIKELIHOOD RATIO (LR) FILES
entities.description: Files produced by QTL analysis software used for visualization in CMTV

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS SOFTWARE
entities.description: Software used to produce likelihood ratio files for QTL data

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Different conditions under which traits are expressed

entities.name: CROSSES
entities.description: Breeding methods used to generate genetic diversity for QTL analysis

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show significant differences in expression levels
